source: Curated for thesis reproduction of Raj et al. arXiv:2511.00739 Figure 2e
query_template: What is the 3D structure and key molecular descriptors of {NAME}? Look up the molecule, generate a 3D conformer, and report molecular weight, logP, TPSA, heavy-atom count, and number of rotatable bonds.
